articles.description: Follow live text commentary and score updates as Bayern Munich face Manchester United and watch live BBC coverage Chelsea host Arsenal in the Women's Champions League quarter-finals.
articles.title: Women's Champions League LIVE: Bayern Munich vs Manchester United followed by Chelsea vs Arsenal - Build-up, team news, score and text updates

articles.description: Chelsea has announced a Premier League‑record pre‑tax loss of £262m for the 2024‑25 season, surpassing the previous record of £179.5m set by Manchester City in 2011.
articles.title: Chelsea record pre-tax loss of £262.4m - the biggest in PL history

articles.description: BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty picks his 26-man England World Cup squad.
articles.title: World Cup 2026: Who will make Thomas Tuchel's England squad? Do you agree with Phil McNulty's choices?

articles.description: Lamine Yamal says racist chants heard during Spain's 0-0 draw with Egypt in Barcelona on Tuesday were "disrespectful and intolerable".
articles.title: Lamine Yamal condemns racist abuse heard during Spain v Egypt friendly

articles.description: Italy fail to qualify for a third World Cup in a row after penalty defeat by Bosnia-Herzegovina in play-off final.
articles.title: Italy miss World Cup: Bosnia-Herzegovina shootout defeat means Azzurri fail to reach tournament for third time in a row

articles.description: Emma Raducanu delays the start of her clay-court season as she continues to recover from a viral illness, according to her representatives.
articles.title: Emma Raducanu withdraws from Linz Open after viral illness

articles.description: England's World Cup hopes rest on captain Harry Kane after a grim taste of life without him in the defeat against Japan at Wembley, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.
articles.title: England 0-1 Japan: A failed experiment as Tuchel gets grim glimpse of life without Harry Kane

articles.description: Premier League clubs made payments of £460m to agents over the past year - a 13% increase on the previous 12 months.
articles.title: Premier League clubs spend record £460m on agent fees

articles.description: Manchester United are within touching distance of a return to the Champions League. How has interim boss Michael Carrick done it?
articles.title: Manchester United: How Michael Carrick steered club towards Champions League

articles.description: Multiple billion-dollar bids have been made for teams in the NBA's proposed Euros league, BBC Sport understands.
articles.title: NBA Europe: Billion-dollar bids made for franchises in proposed league
